summary:
I've found and fixed the bug. The issue was an off-by-one error in `processor.py` when slicing the list for batches:

```python
# Before
end = start + batch_size - 1  # grab exactly batch_size items
batch = records[start:end]

# After
end = start + batch_size
batch = records[start:end]
```
Python slices `[start:end]` are exclusive at the `end` index, so subtracting 1 caused it to drop the last record of every batch.

After correcting this, I ran `test.sh` to verify the fix:

```
PASS: All records processed correctly across batch boundaries
```
